hooks.command: d="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; f="$d/.code-flow/scripts/cf_post_hook.py"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then cd "$d" && python3 "$f"; fi
d="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; f="$d/.code-flow/scripts/cf_user_prompt_hook.py"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then cd "$d" && python3 "$f"; fi
d="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; f="$d/.code-flow/scripts/cf_stop_hook.py"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then cd "$d" && python3 "$f"; fi
d="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; f="$d/.code-flow/scripts/cf_pre_tool_hook.py"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then cd "$d" && python3 "$f"; fi
